title: JEI Recipe History
description: Client side history of recent JEI recipe lookups
body:
A [JEI Utilities](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei-utilities) fork that ports the recipe history feature to newer versions of Minecraft.

The most recent items you have looked up in [JustEnoughItems (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) will be displayed above the search bar in a neat list.

* The recipe history list can be configured to have a custom tint, 
* Row count can be configured to be between 1 and 5
* Recipes looked up are by default sensitive to NBT and this feature can be turned off in the config
* The recipe history can be toggle off in the config

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Elnre0D7/images/d000c1bb8445d13ca70a1d0426bc75f7f6880d78.png)
